com.pax.poslink.peripheries

Interface POSLinkPrinter.PrinterStatus

  • Enclosing class:
    POSLinkPrinter

    public static interface POSLinkPrinter.PrinterStatus

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int BUSY
      Printer is busy
      static int COVER_OPEN_ERROR
      Cover open error(only support:E500,E800,SK600,SK800)
      static int CUT_JAM_ERROR
      Cut jam error(only support:E500,E800)
      static int DATA_PACKAGE_IS_TOO_LONG
      Data package is too long
      static int MALFUNCTIONS
      Printer malfunctions
      static int NOT_INSTALLED_FONT_LIBRARY
      The printer has not installed font library
      static int OUT_OF_PAPER
      Out of paper
      static int OVER_HEATS
      Printer over heats
      static int PRINT_DATA_PACKET_ERROR
      The format of print data packet error
      static int SUCCESS
      Success
      static int UNFINISHED
      Printing is unfinished
      static int VOLTAGE_IS_TOO_LOW
      Printer voltage is too low
